title: cli.rs: --markdown and positional content are not mutually exclusive
description: The Post subcommand accepts both --markdown and a positional content argument with no clap conflicts_with constraint. If a user passes both, the markdown path silently wins and the content argument is dropped without any error or warning. Add #[arg(conflicts_with = "markdown")] to the content field so clap rejects the combination at parse time with a clear error message.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
